metadata.name: midas-dlpdata
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v2 (LGPLv2)
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A MIDAS module for Default Load Profile datasets.

modules.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.module
documentation: MIDAS upgrade module for Smart Nord data simulator.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.module.DLPDataModule.check_module_params
documentation: Check the module params and provide default values.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.module.DLPDataModule.check_sim_params
documentation: Check the params for a certain simulator instance.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.module.DLPDataModule.start_models
documentation: Start models of a certain simulator.

modules.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.model
documentation: This module contains the default load profile data model.

classes.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.model.DLPModel

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.model.DLPModel.step
documentation:
Generate the data for the next time interval defined by
now_dt.
A model to handle a default load profile.

modules.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.meta
documentation:
This module contains the meta for the default load profile
simulator.

All profiles are normalized to an annual consumption of 1000 kWh/a.

modules.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.simulator
documentation: This module contains the DLP simulator.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.simulator.DLPSimulator.init
documentation:
Called exactly ones after the simulator has been started.

Parameters
----------
sid : str
    Simulator ID for this simulator.
step_size : int, optional
    Step size for this simulator. Defaults to 900.

Returns
-------
dict
    The meta dict (set by *mosaik_api.Simulator*).

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.simulator.DLPSimulator.create
documentation:
Initialize the simulation model instance (entity).

Parameters
----------
num : int
    The number of models to create.
model : str
    The name of the models to create. Must be present inside
    the simulator's meta.

Returns
-------
list
    A list with information on the created entity.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.simulator.DLPSimulator.step
documentation:
Perform a simulation step.

Parameters
----------
time : int
    The current simulation step (by convention in seconds since
    simulation start.
inputs : dict
    A *dict* containing inputs for entities of this simulator.

Returns
-------
int
    The next step this simulator wants to be stepped.

methods.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.simulator.DLPSimulator.get_data
documentation:
Return the requested output (if feasible).

Parameters
----------
outputs : dict
    A *dict* containing requested outputs of each entity.

Returns
-------
dict
    A *dict* containing the values of the requested outputs.

functions.name: midas.modules.dlpdata.download.download_dlp
documentation:
Download and convert default load profiles.

The default load profiles can be downloaded from the BDEW (last
visited on 2020-07-07):

https://www.bdew.de/energie/standardlastprofile-strom/
